title: Skill Health Validator — Daily Scheduled Job
summary: Created daily OpenCode scheduled job that validates skill taxonomy health. Manual test run found and fixed 47 missing junctions (mostly .agents surface) and flagged 1 frontmatter issue.
keyOutcomes: Validator prompt created with 5 checks + auto-fix + flag logic
Scheduled job registered for daily 6 AM in development scope
Test run auto-fixed 47 missing junctions across Codex and .agents
1 frontmatter flag: clickup-cli name mismatch (needs manual fix)
